subcodes.first_line: O servant of God! Sulfur is the fire of the love of God and mercury is the living water of the ocean of the knowledge of God.
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای بنده حق کبریت آتش محبت الله است و زیبق سیماب بحر معرفت الله پس این دو جزء
subcodes.subjects: @alchemy; the elixir, @knowledge; recognition of God, @love of God, @spiritual transformation
